name: showLessonTopic
description: Update the BiteCode lesson presentation when the mentor begins a new major topic or subtopic. Do not call for every sentence. Supply a short title and up to six concise points, with one point per line.

parameters.description: Short learner-facing title of the topic currently being explained.
Zero to six concise learner-facing points. Put each point on a separate line. Do not include JSON, bullets, or numbering.
